original: This self-contained injection system is loaded with potent drugs known to cause a rush of energy. Popular with mercenary forces and private militaries alike, PI-Stims can be found anywhere warriors prioritize combat effectiveness over long-term health.\n\nKnown to cause slight amounts of taint. Check your Codex for details.

original: You press the applicator tip against your arm and barely even feel the telltale pinch of an injection. The rush of jittery, high-octane energy has your [pc.legOrLegs] bouncing and your jaw clenching.
